---
title: q.gym Roadmap
---

Only open work is listed here. Completed items are removed.

## Planned

- [ ] Make `q.gym` an interactive Gymnasium adapter over the `q.bt` execution kernel
- [ ] Multi-asset portfolio actions and observations
- [ ] Pluggable spread, slippage, latency, and partial-fill models
- [ ] Leverage, concentration, and turnover constraints
- [ ] Walk-forward train/evaluation episode schemes
- [ ] RLlib training and evaluation tutorial with checkpointing
